texto: I’m less interested in proselytizing or a bigger tent for its own sake than in issues of human flourishing. What are the best conditions in which people live and flourish? It’s more the, How do we get along? What does it mean for living now?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Karen L. King que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “I’m less interested in proselytizing or a bigger tent for its own sake than in issues of human fl…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, christianity, jesus, com foco em jesus e religion.
